name: jp.co.unvgi.vtuber-system-base.camera-switcher-output-adapter
description: Main-output-side adapter that bridges OSC (UCAPI Flat Record) and IPC (core-ipc-foundation) traffic from the camera-switcher-tab UI into the output-renderer-shell scene. Owns a uOSC.uOscServer for /ucapi/camera/{cameraId}/flat reception, allocates cameraIds, manages Camera GameObjects under CamerasRoot, drives Local Volume override application via Reflection, and handles camera/command, camera/{id}/metadata/{key}, camera/{id}/volume/* and camera/{id}/volume/overrides/metadata IPC handlers. UI tab work and OSC sender are out of scope.

samples.description: Same-process uOscClient that emits UCAPI Flat Records to 127.0.0.1:9000 to validate the receive pipeline without the camera-switcher-tab UI.
